nf:module.nf:name: user_top
nf:module.nf:description: Registers for user_top CPU + FIFO + GPU integration

nf:register.nf:name: sw_ctrl
nf:register.nf:description: Control register. bit0=bypass_enable, bit1=icache_wr_req pulse, bit2=dbg_bram_en, bit3=soft_reset, bit4=proc_owner_gpu_cfg, bit5=gpu_mmio_wr_req pulse, bit6=gpu_mmio_rd_req pulse, bit7=gpu_imem_wr_req pulse

nf:register.nf:name: sw_gpu_imem_wdata
nf:register.nf:description: GPU instruction memory program write data

nf:register.nf:name: hw_status
nf:register.nf:description: Global FIFO/processor status. bit0=fifo_full, bit1=proc_owner_gpu, bit2=pkt_ready, bit3=fifo_proc_active, bit4=done_sticky_any, bit5=fifo_dbg_mem_rvalid, bit7:6=fifo_dbg_state, bit16:8=fifo_dbg_pkt_len

nf:register.nf:name: hw_pc
nf:register.nf:description: Debug PC of current processing owner: CPU PC or GPU PC depending on proc_owner_gpu

nf:register.nf:name: hw_bram_lo
nf:register.nf:description: FIFO debug BRAM read data low 32 bits

nf:register.nf:name: hw_bram_hi
nf:register.nf:description: FIFO debug BRAM read data high 32 bits

nf:register.nf:name: hw_bram_ctrl
nf:register.nf:description: FIFO debug BRAM read control field

nf:register.nf:name: hw_gpu_mmio_rdata
nf:register.nf:description: Readback data from GPU internal MMIO

nf:register.nf:name: hw_gpu_status
nf:register.nf:description: GPU status register. bit0=gpu_busy, bit1=proc_owner_gpu, bit2=gpu_proc_active, bit3=gpu_proc_done, bit4=gpu_done_sticky, bit5=gpu_adapter_busy, bit25:10=gpu_dbg_pc
